[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001100101 4
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 110001011 5
5 011010011 5
6 000010010 2
7 100001100 3

34 43 000000100 1
